headerDisplay: Next-gen Pentair IntelliCenter plugin. A thin shim over a Go sidecar that talks to IntelliCenter over WebSocket.

ipAddress.title: IntelliCenter IP Address (optional)
ipAddress.description: Leave blank to auto-discover your IntelliCenter via mDNS (recommended). Set an IP only if discovery doesn't work on your network (e.g. running in Docker with bridge networking).

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often the sidecar polls IntelliCenter for state (pump RPM/watts are poll-only).

metricsPort.title: Prometheus Metrics Port
metricsPort.description: The sidecar serves Prometheus metrics at http://<host>:<port>/metrics for Grafana, alongside HomeKit. Change the port if 8080 conflicts; you must also expose this port from the container/host to scrape it.
